title: Create:GrowableOres Compat
description: Use Mixin make growable ores compatible with create machine.
body:
A simple compatibility mod using Mixin to make Growable Ores work properly with Create machines.

Requires Create 6.0 or newer.  
Allows **Mechanical Saw** and **Mechanical Harvester** to correctly harvest **Growable Ore Cane**.

If this mod causes crashes or unexpected behavior, **do not report issues to the Create mod**.  
Please report them to us instead.
![Create:GrowableOres Compat](https://s2.loli.net/2025/08/06/ok3bONzIQjYasin.jpg)

#### For the detailed information, please read the minute contents below. THANKS!!!
